ddls:
CREATE TABLE "museums" (
  "museum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each museum */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the museum */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the museum */,
  "district" TEXT /* District where the museum is located */,
  "commune" TEXT /* Commune where the museum is located */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of museum (e.g., art, history, science) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the museum */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email address */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the museum's website */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours */,
  "admission_fee" TEXT /* Admission fee */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the museum record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the museum record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("museum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "museum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the museum the collection belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the collection */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of collection (e.g., artifacts, artworks, historical objects) */,
  "curator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the curator responsible for the collection */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date when the collection was acquired */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the collection */,
  "value" TEXT /* Estimated value of the collection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the collection record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the collection record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_museum_id FOREIGN KEY ("museum_id") REFERENCES museums ("museum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_curator_id FOREIGN KEY ("curator_id") REFERENCES curators ("curator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exhibitions" (
  "exhibition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exhibition */,
  "museum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the museum the exhibition is held at */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the exhibition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the exhibition */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the exhibition */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the exhibition */,
  "curator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the curator responsible for the exhibition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location within the museum */,
  "audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the exhibition (e.g., children, adults) */,
  "ticket_price" TEXT /* Price of tickets for the exhibition */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of visitors allowed at a time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the exhibition record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the exhibition record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exhibition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exhibitions_curator_id FOREIGN KEY ("curator_id") REFERENCES curators ("curator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exhibitions_museum_id FOREIGN KEY ("museum_id") REFERENCES museums ("museum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "museum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the museum the event is held at */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizer responsible for the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location within the museum */,
  "audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the event (e.g., children, adults) */,
  "ticket_price" TEXT /* Price of tickets for the event */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of visitors allowed at a time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES curators ("curator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_museum_id FOREIGN KEY ("museum_id") REFERENCES museums ("museum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "membership_type" TEXT /* Type of membership (e.g., individual, family) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the member joined */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the membership expires */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the member record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the member record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donors" (
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the donor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the donor */,
  "donation_amount" TEXT /* Amount of donation */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the donor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "donation_date" TEXT /* Date of the donation */,
  "donation_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the donation (e.g., exhibition, general fund) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the donor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the donor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "museum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the museum visited */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_time" TEXT /* Time of the visit */,
  "exhibition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exhibition visited (if applicable) */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event attended (if applicable) */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (e.g., adult, child, senior) */,
  "ticket_price" TEXT /* Price of the ticket */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the visit record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the visit record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_exhibition_id FOREIGN KEY ("exhibition_id") REFERENCES exhibitions ("exhibition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_museum_id FOREIGN KEY ("museum_id") REFERENCES museums ("museum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "curators" (
  "curator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each curator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the curator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the curator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the curator record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the curator record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("curator_id")
)
